ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the author */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the author's literary agent */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON column to store links to the author's social media profiles */,
  "awards" TEXT /* JSON column to store a list of awards the author has received */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "works" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literary work */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the work */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the literary work */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the literary work */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the literary work */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the literary work was published */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the literary work */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number of the work */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the work */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the work is written */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series (if the work is part of a series) */,
  "series_position" INTEGER /* Position of the work in the series */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the cover image of the work */,
  "sales_figures" TEXT /* JSON column to store sales figures for the work */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the work record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the work record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_works_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_works_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_works_publisher FOREIGN KEY ("publisher") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work the draft belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the draft */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the draft */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the draft (e.g., draft, review, final) */,
  "editor_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the editor about the draft */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the draft */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the draft was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the draft was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., magazine, online platform) */,
  "review_url" TEXT /* URL to the full review */,
  "reviewer_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., professional, fan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work associated with the event */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author associated with the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., book reading, signing) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL to the event's webpage or registration page */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "organizer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the event organizer */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, publisher, marketing) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the work */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the work was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the work was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the work (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_access_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "work_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literary work the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the work */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, review, final) */,
  "editor_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the editor about the version */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_versions_work_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_id") REFERENCES works ("work_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genre structure) */,
  "genre_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the publisher */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)
